FinalCTA.title: Ready to Elevate Your Food Business?

hero.title: Precision-Built Solutions for the Food Industry
hero.subtitle: From strategy to certification, from training to transformation — we deliver end-to-end expertise that elevates every layer of your food operation.

philosophy.heading: Systems That Scale. Standards That Last.
philosophy.p1: Every engagement begins with deep understanding. We study your operations, your market, and your goals before recommending a single change.
philosophy.p2: Our methodology integrates consultancy, quality systems, and human development into a unified framework — because sustainable success requires all three.
philosophy.p3: We don't deliver templates. We build systems tailored to your context, your culture, and your growth trajectory.

consultancy.title: Build the Foundation. Design the Future.
consultancy.description: Strategic planning, operational architecture, and menu engineering for food businesses that demand excellence.
consultancy.body: We work alongside founders, operators, and leadership teams to design every layer of your food business — from initial concept through to sustainable scale. Our consultancy isn't theoretical. It's built on decades of hands-on food industry experience.
consultancy.benefits: Office & field consultations, Menu design & engineering, Project establishment & planning, Operational systems & SOPs, Cost & calorie calculations, Sustainability transformation

office.title: Office & Field Consultations
office.desc: On-site and remote expert assessments to diagnose and elevate your operations.

menu.title: Menu Design & Engineering
menu.desc: Data-driven menu development that balances creativity, cost, and customer demand.

project.title: Project Establishment & Planning
project.desc: End-to-end setup for new food ventures — from concept to operational launch.

quality.title: Certify. Protect. Excel.
quality.description: International quality systems, food safety protocols, and compliance frameworks that protect your brand and your customers.
quality.body: From ISO certification to HACCP implementation, we build the quality infrastructure that regulators trust and customers rely on. Every system we design is audit-ready from day one — with full documentation, staff training, and continuous improvement frameworks.
quality.benefits: ISO 9001 & ISO 22000 certification, HACCP system implementation, Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP), Internal audit frameworks, Compliance documentation, Corrective action protocols

iso.title: ISO Certification Systems
iso.desc: ISO 9001 and ISO 22000 implementation with full documentation and audit readiness.

haccp.title: HACCP & GMP
haccp.desc: Hazard analysis, critical control points, and good manufacturing practices for every production line.

audit.title: Audits & Compliance
audit.desc: Comprehensive safety audits with actionable corrective measures and ongoing monitoring.

training.title: Invest in People. Multiply Results.
training.description: Specialized culinary and operational training programs that transform teams into high-performing assets.
training.body: Our training programs are designed by practitioners who have led kitchens, managed operations, and built teams from the ground up. Every session combines hands-on practice with real-world application — because lasting change happens through doing.
training.benefits: Employee training programs, Chef development & technique, Specialized workshops, Food safety certification prep, Kitchen leadership coaching, Custom program design

employee.title: Employee Training
employee.desc: Foundational and advanced programs for kitchen staff, service teams, and operations managers.

chef.title: Chef Development
chef.desc: Advanced culinary technique, menu innovation, and leadership development for professional chefs.

specialized.title: Workshops & Specialized Programs
specialized.desc: Targeted sessions on food safety, sustainability, and industry-specific best practices.

hero.title: Strategic Architecture for Food Excellence
hero.subtitle: From initial concept to operational mastery — we design the frameworks that turn ambition into sustainable, scalable food businesses.

intro.heading: Every Detail. Engineered for Growth.
intro.description: Our consultancy covers the full spectrum of food business development — whether you're launching a new concept, optimizing an existing operation, or scaling across multiple locations.

office.title: Office Consultations
office.desc: In-depth strategic sessions at our offices to analyze your business model, identify gaps, and map your growth trajectory.
office.included: Business model analysis, gap assessment, strategic roadmap, performance benchmarking

field.title: Field Consultations
field.desc: On-site expert assessments of your facilities, workflows, and team performance with actionable improvement plans.
field.included: Facility audit, workflow analysis, staff evaluation, corrective action plan

menu.title: Menu Design
menu.desc: Data-driven menu engineering that balances culinary creativity with cost optimization and market positioning.
menu.included: Menu architecture, pricing strategy, ingredient sourcing, seasonal planning

project.title: Project Establishment
project.desc: Complete setup guidance for new food ventures — from concept development through to operational launch.
project.included: Concept design, feasibility study, licensing guidance, launch planning

operational.title: Operational Planning
operational.desc: Systematic optimization of daily operations to maximize efficiency, reduce waste, and improve consistency.
operational.included: SOP development, workflow design, capacity planning, KPI frameworks

sustainability.title: Sustainability Transformation
sustainability.desc: Transition your operations toward sustainable practices without compromising quality or profitability.
sustainability.included: Waste reduction, energy optimization, sustainable sourcing, reporting frameworks

cost.title: Cost Calculations
cost.desc: Precise cost analysis and modeling to protect margins, optimize purchasing, and ensure financial sustainability.
cost.included: Food cost analysis, labor cost modeling, overhead allocation, pricing optimization

calorie.title: Calorie Calculations
calorie.desc: Accurate nutritional analysis and calorie calculations for menu compliance and health-conscious positioning.
calorie.included: Nutritional analysis, allergen mapping, labeling compliance, health menu development

hero.title: International Standards. Uncompromising Execution.
hero.subtitle: We build quality management systems that protect your brand, satisfy regulators, and give your customers absolute confidence.

intro.heading: Systems Built to Certify. Designed to Last.
intro.description: From ISO certification to HACCP implementation, we provide end-to-end quality system design, documentation, training, and audit preparation.

iso9001.title: ISO 9001
iso9001.subtitle: Quality Management System
iso9001.goal: Establish a comprehensive quality management system that ensures consistent product quality and continuous improvement.
iso9001.included: Quality policy development, process documentation, internal audit framework, management review system, corrective action procedures
iso9001.steps: Gap analysis, System design, Documentation, Staff training, Internal audit, Certification audit

iso22000.title: ISO 22000
iso22000.subtitle: Food Safety Management System
iso22000.goal: Implement an internationally recognized food safety management system covering the entire food chain.
iso22000.included: Hazard analysis, prerequisite programs, FSMS documentation, traceability systems, emergency preparedness
iso22000.steps: Current state assessment, Hazard identification, Control measures, System documentation, Verification, Certification

haccp.title: HACCP
haccp.subtitle: Hazard Analysis & Critical Control Points
haccp.goal: Identify, evaluate, and control hazards that are significant to food safety at every stage of production.
haccp.included: Hazard analysis, CCP identification, critical limits, monitoring procedures, corrective actions, verification protocols
haccp.steps: Team assembly, Product description, Flow diagram, Hazard analysis, CCP determination, System validation

gmp.title: GMP
gmp.subtitle: Good Manufacturing Practices
gmp.goal: Ensure that food products are consistently produced and controlled according to quality standards appropriate for their intended use.
gmp.included: Facility design review, hygiene protocols, pest control programs, equipment maintenance, personnel practices
gmp.steps: Facility assessment, Protocol development, Staff training, Implementation, Monitoring, Continuous improvement

hero.title: Transform Teams. Elevate Performance.
hero.subtitle: Specialized programs that build capability, instill excellence, and create lasting operational impact across every level of your organization.

intro.heading: Knowledge That Transfers. Skills That Stay.
intro.description: Our training programs are designed by practitioners, not theorists. Every session combines hands-on practice with real-world application — because lasting change happens through doing, not just learning.

employee.title: Employee Training
employee.desc: Comprehensive foundational programs for kitchen staff, service teams, and operations managers. We build the baseline competency that excellent operations require.
employee.outcomes: Improved food handling, standardized procedures, reduced waste, higher team confidence

chef.title: Chef Development
chef.desc: Advanced culinary programs focused on technique refinement, menu innovation, kitchen leadership, and creative development for professional chefs.
chef.outcomes: Enhanced technique, menu innovation capability, leadership skills, creative confidence

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.desc: Intensive, focused workshops on specific topics — from food safety compliance to sustainability practices and industry trend analysis.
workshops.outcomes: Targeted skill acquisition, certification readiness, practical implementation plans

specialized.title: Specialized Programs
specialized.desc: Custom-designed training programs tailored to your specific operational challenges, team composition, and business objectives.
specialized.outcomes: Custom skill development, operational alignment, measurable performance improvement

cta.eyebrow: Ready to Invest in Your Team?
cta.title: Request a Training Program
cta.description: Tell us about your team and your goals. We'll design a program that delivers measurable results.

ContactPage.title: Schedule a Consultation
ContactPage.description: Bring your challenges, your goals, or your existing operations. We'll assess them with you live — and show you exactly how Humam can help.

bullets.b2: Real gaps identified, real solutions proposed
bullets.b3: See what structured excellence looks like

testimonial.quote: Humam didn't just consult — they transformed how we think about quality and operations. The results speak for themselves.

hero.title: A beacon in the sea of food, from the ground to the ground.
hero.subtitle: Guiding businesses in the food sector with expertise that combines business development with creativity in food sciences.

story.heading: Built by Experts Who Lived This Work
story.p1: Humam specializes in guiding businesses in the food sector — from production and cooking to manufacturing, training, quality services, and logistical support planning.
story.p2: This institution is led by experts in food and quality, combining business development expertise with creativity in food sciences. We understand the real challenges of running food operations at scale.
story.p3: From restaurants and catering kitchens to food factories and Hajj companies, we build the frameworks that turn ambition into sustainable success.

vision.title: Leading the Future of Food Consultancy
vision.description: To become leaders in consultancy and business development in the food sector, ensuring the sustainability of successful enterprises.

mission.title: Build. Train. Sustain.
mission.description: To build high-quality strategies and plans for food organizations and train their teams to achieve sustainable business success.

values.title: Our Values & Principles
values.subtitle: Inspired by the vision of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, our identity, and the richness of our culture, Humam soars to new heights in business.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We build lasting relationships founded on transparency and reliability. Our clients trust us because we earn it — every engagement, every deliverable.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We don't just consult — we collaborate. Every engagement is a true partnership where your success is our measure of achievement.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We hold ourselves and our clients to the highest standards. Every recommendation, every system, every training program reflects our commitment to excellence.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: We take ownership of outcomes. From food safety to operational planning, we ensure that every solution we deliver creates measurable, lasting impact.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We pursue the highest standard in everything we do — from ISO certification support to culinary training — never settling for less.

commitment.title: More Than Consultants — Committed Partners
commitment.description: At Humam we are more than consultants — we are committed partners dedicated to the success of our clients in the food industry. We believe every food business deserves world-class systems, training, and oversight.

leadership.title: The Experts Behind Humam
leadership.subtitle: Decades of hands-on experience in food operations, quality assurance, and culinary excellence. We lived this work. Now we lead it.

atef.name: Atef Al-Arishi
atef.bio: With 27 years of experience managing the catering sector for Hajj and Umrah pilgrims, Atef is a specialist in operating pre-prepared meals. He also has over 7 years of expertise in supply chain management and logistics. His career began with managing high-profile external event coordination.

enas.name: Enas Khodary
enas.bio: With 16 years of culinary experience, Enas is renowned for her creativity, persistence, and dedication. She is a member of multiple Saudi and international chef associations and is certified by the Culinary Arts Authority as an expert in documenting Saudi cuisine. Enas represents Saudi Arabia in the global Halal community.

alaa.name: Alaa Zahdi
alaa.bio: Alaa specializes in food manufacturing processes, quality assurance, development, and consulting. Passionate about advancing the food industry, she actively researches and adopts technological innovations to provide solutions that enhance production efficiency and minimize waste.

quality.title: Certified Standards. Proven Results.
quality.description: Humam adopts a meticulous approach to implementing the highest quality standards, providing comprehensive support to clients in establishing effective quality systems and ensuring exceptional performance.
